issue.message: The Google Play store has a policy that limits usage of MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.

Duplicate id @+id/graphic, defined or included multiple times in layout-sw720dp/fragment_file_explorer_list.xml: [layout-sw720dp/fragment_file_explorer_list.xml => layout/no_search_results.xml defines @+id/graphic, layout-sw720dp/fragment_file_explorer_list.xml => layout/empty_directory_state.xml defines @+id/graphic]

Field requires API level 26 (current min is 23): `android.provider.Settings#ACTION_APP_NOTIFICATION_SETTINGS`
Field requires API level 26 (current min is 23): `android.provider.Settings#EXTRA_APP_PACKAGE`
Field requires API level 31 (current min is 23): `android.provider.Settings#ACTION_REQUEST_SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM`
Field requires API level 24 (current min is 23): `android.app.NotificationManager#IMPORTANCE_LOW`
Field requires API level 29 (current min is 23): `android.content.pm.ServiceInfo#FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_DATA_SYNC`

Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.

To get local formatting use `getDateInstance()`, `getDateTimeInstance()`, or `getTimeInstance()`, or use `new SimpleDateFormat(String template, Locale locale)` with for example `Locale.US` for ASCII dates.

To get local formatting use `getDateInstance()`, `getDateTimeInstance()`, or `getTimeInstance()`, or use `new SimpleDateFormat(String template, Locale locale)` with for example `Locale.US` for ASCII dates.
The WIFI_SERVICE must be looked up on the Application context or memory will leak on devices < Android N. Try changing `mContext` to `mContext.getApplicationContext()`
Method getContext must be called from the UI thread, currently inferred thread is worker thread
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html
